purpose: Red tests for the first Hermes core / Hades module split slice.
guards: Railway/Vercel deploy artifacts remain present and correctly separated.
Core/shared/auth code must not import Hades product modules.
Core/shared/auth code must not contain non-portable local, Hades, or hosted-path assumptions.
movePolicy: Keep with reusable boilerplate until Phase 1 is green; after extraction, keep as a portable-hostability gate.
